title: Factory Pipeline Event
description: One line of the JSONL event stream emitted by the factory pipeline. Reference artifact for human readers and future tooling. NOT wired into validate.ts; the pure TypeScript types in tools/pipeline/events.ts are the authoritative contract today.

event_type.description: The closed taxonomy of event types. Phase 6 (recovery) extends this list further; Phase 5.7 added cost.cap_crossed.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp (UTC) for when the event was emitted.

provenance.description: Origin of this event. Consumers filter by provenance: recovery operates on live_run, the future memory write-side ingests live_run only, tests stay isolated.

run_id.description: Unique id for the pipeline invocation that produced this event. Format: ISO timestamp (filesystem-safe) + 8-hex-char random suffix.

payload.description: Per-event-type payload. Discriminated by `event_type`, which is also present at this level. See tools/pipeline/events.ts for the per-type payload shapes.
